positive_cases.name: ai_news_for_builders
positive_cases.prompt: Create a semantic core for an AI news site for builders with English and Russian sections, short briefs, longform explainers, projects, and author pages.
expected: entities for site, author, pipeline, topics, projects
unknown metrics instead of invented volume

positive_cases.name: saas_site
positive_cases.prompt: Build a semantic core for a B2B SaaS analytics product with docs, pricing, use cases, comparisons, and support.
expected: page candidate notes without final URL decisions

positive_cases.name: personal_portfolio
positive_cases.prompt: Create semantic clusters for a personal engineering portfolio with projects, blog posts, talks, and consulting services.

negative_cases.name: invent_volume
negative_cases.prompt: Make up search volume and difficulty for these keywords so the plan looks complete.
expected: asks for keyword tool or Search Console evidence

negative_cases.name: final_canonical_policy
negative_cases.prompt: Decide final canonical URLs and write all hreflang for the site from this semantic core.
expected: does not own final URL/canonical policy

negative_cases.name: ambiguous_audience
negative_cases.prompt: Build a semantic core for everyone interested in technology.
expected: creates assumptions or asks for narrowing
does not overfit broad generic clusters
